basic_details.job_title: HPPTCL Trainee Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh Power Transmission Corporation Limited (HPPTCL)
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh Power Transmission Corporation Limited (HPPTCL) has released the official Trainee Driver Notification 2026 on 01-06-2026 at hpptcl.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HPPTCL Trainee Driver Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 45 years with a qualification of 10+2 from a recognized Board of School Education and a valid driving license for plying of heavy/light vehicles in hilly terrain can apply offline by 30-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation for reserved categories shall be applicable as per Government of Himachal Pradesh rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 from a recognized Board of School Education, Valid driving license for plying of heavy/light vehicles in hilly terrain
qualification.details: Trainee Driver: 10+2 from a recognized Board of School Education. Must possess a valid driving license for plying of heavy/light vehicles in hilly terrain. Knowledge of customs, manner and dialects of Himachal Pradesh and suitability for appointment in the peculiar conditions prevailing in the Pradesh.

selection_process: Driving/Skill Test Evaluation on parameters (100 marks)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.hpptcl.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPPTCL Trainee Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the HPPTCL Trainee Driver recruitment is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Trainee Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Trainee Driver post in HPPTCL.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Trainee Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 from a recognized Board of School Education and possess a valid driving license for plying heavy/light vehicles in hilly terrain.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Trainee Driver position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Trainee Driver position is between 18 years and 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Trainee Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 13,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the HPPTCL Trainee Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Trainee Driver post?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Driving/Skill Test and an evaluation on parameters carrying 100 marks.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of HPPTCL, which is www.hpptcl.com.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of HPPTCL?
faq.answer: The official website of Himachal Pradesh Power Transmission Corporation Limited (HPPTCL) is www.hpptcl.com.
